programme.title: E10 - 邦邦深情獻歌表白
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E9 - 謝娜直接給曾志偉跪了
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: E10 - 詩詞裡的二十四節氣(上)
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

programme.title: E22 - 科學減重更健康 (下)
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

E15
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E36 - Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They will need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E24 - Andy And The Manatee
programme.desc: When a crab inadvertently chops up some sea grass that Mr Hammond had collected for a manatee back at Safari World, it's up to Andy to save the day.

programme.title: E5 - Mud
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: E4 - The Camouflage Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.title: E3 - The Day Off Badge
programme.desc: It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.

programme.title: E15 - Go Jetter Or No Jetter?
programme.desc: Foz starts to think his team doesn't need him anymore. Can Tala convince him he still has what it takes to be a Go Jetter, or will he follow Glitch down a different path?

programme.title: E15 - Planetarium Aquarium
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck go to the aquarium to track down a waving fish.

programme.title: E16 - Shallot Boat
programme.desc: After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: E16 - Sofa
programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: E37 - It's Time To Make A Rocket
programme.desc: Inspired by Captain Chloe, JoJo learns about astronauts and how they travelled through space to the moon.

programme.title: E4 - Treasure In The Plant Aisle
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: E36 - Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They will need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E16 - Sofa

programme.title: E37 - It's Time To Make A Rocket
programme.desc: Inspired by Captain Chloe, JoJo learns about astronauts and how they travelled through space to the moon.

programme.title: E4 - Treasure In The Plant Aisle
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E107 - Straws
programme.desc: Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: E3 - Surprise! - Bluey Special Trilogy Episode 3
programme.desc: Bluey special trilogy episode 3 - Bluey and Bingo want dad to play two different games, so dad tries to play both at the same time. While also watching the race on TV.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E15 - First Day On Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: E40 - Cave Of Crystals, Mexico
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: E13 - Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E37 - The Adventure
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: E38 - Copycat
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: E14 - Manatees
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to crystal river in Florida, North America, to find out how manatees survive the cold water in winter.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E908 - Pups Save The Hatchlings / Pups Save A Wrongway Farmhand
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger decides to make the world's biggest omelet, he accidentally orders the wrong kind of eggs - ones that hatch. // Traveling Travis volunteers to watch Farmer Yumi and Farmer Al's Farm and characteristically messes up everything.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E313 - Penguin Panic / Cave Conundrum
programme.desc: When an iceberg boat turns up on the shore, the city and forest are suddenly overrun with problematic penguins! // When the Deer Squad get separated in the crystal caves, they must think and act like each other to get out safely.

programme.title: E105 - Hide And Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: E905 - Pups Save A Sand Sculpture Contest
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tries to cheat at the Adventure Bay sand sculpture contest, his machine goes out-of-control.

programme.title: E101 - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E105 - Hide And Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E430
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E7 - The Soul And The Sword/Olga, Shaman Of The Peaks
programme.desc: A portrait of a passionate fencing master and a tribute to Olga Letykai Csonka, the shaman who passed away in 2024.

programme.title: E15 - Yellow Vests/Teachers/Miss Hayange/Jewelry
programme.desc: Coming up: signs of a return of the Yellow Vests movement; future teachers worried about their professional prospects; the election of Miss Hayange; giving new life to old jewelry...

programme.title: E14 - Megeve With Emmanuel Renaut (2/2)
programme.desc: ''Put a piece of the mountains on your plate!'' This is the motto of three-star chef and Meilleur Ouvrier de France, Emmanuel Renaut, who works at the Flocons de Sel hotel and restaurant. Welcome to Megeve, where you can enjoy mountain cuisine and discover a rich land!

programme.title: E4 - Lightning And Thunder
programme.desc: The men set out on their first major mountain trek in the Gastlosen. They practise rope handling, but the approach of a thunderstorm puts them at risk. Rapid decisions must be made. Will they make the right choices?

programme.title: E126
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.desc: A portrait of a passionate fencing master and a tribute to Olga Letykai Csonka, the shaman who passed away in 2024.

programme.title: E16 - The Unpredictable
programme.desc: Frederic Barbary, a former shopkeeper, retrains as a sailor. For this demanding profession, he goes back to school at over 50 years old. While waiting to obtain his navigation ranks, he learns from other sailors and shares his passion when he is not out fishing on his traditional sailing boat.

programme.title: E9 - A Stroll Along The Seine/Designer Alyssa Jos
programme.desc: Embarking on ''Les Maquereaux'' barge on the Seine means rediscovering Paris in a whole new way. All you need to know about Mary Jane shoes. Under the fingers of plant designer Alyssa Jos, dead leaves are transformed into works of art. Butter yellow is the colour of spring-summer 2025.

programme.title: E4 - The Unusual 2 Cvs
programme.desc: Laurent and Oceane travel to Saint-Ouen-le-Brisoult to discover unusual 2 CV models. Focus on the Peugeot 205 Rallye. Michel meets Florie, who restores seats for vintage cars and motorcycles.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs, Chateaux And Vines
programme.desc: Champagne, Saint-Emilion, the Loire Valley and Burgundy. In France today, four exceptional wine-growing regions have been awarded the prestigous title of world heritage sites. We explore these landscapes shaped by man...

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.desc: Laurent and Oceane travel to Saint-Ouen-le-Brisoult to discover unusual 2 CV models. Focus on the Peugeot 205 Rallye. Michel meets Florie, who restores seats for vintage cars and motorcycles.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs, Chateaux And Vines
programme.desc: Champagne, Saint-Emilion, the Loire Valley and Burgundy. In France today, four exceptional wine-growing regions have been awarded the prestigous title of world heritage sites. We explore these landscapes shaped by man...

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: E9 - A Stroll Along The Seine/Designer Alyssa Jos

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn
programme.desc: Adapt or perish in the coral streets as higher-than-normal temperatures make autumn cooling (and survival) more difficult. Shack up with a clownfish family and their sea anemone landlord, then see cleaner fish give manta rays a day at the spa.

programme.title: E5 - Mexico's Artificial Reefs
programme.desc: From opportunistic pirate ships, to well-armed navy vessels, Mexico’s Yucatan Peninsula is steeped in maritime history.

programme.title: E5 - The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Film a wild dog hunt with Julz as he catches up with the Manzi pack at a kill, and watch for leopards and hyenas as the Kakuli pack takes great risks while waiting for the rains to come. Go on an epic hunt with a returning male of the Stork Colony.

programme.title: The Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet’s biggest biomass migration, the annual 1,000-mile sardine run along South Africa’s east coast. See billions of these tiny fish run a gauntlet of hungry predators, including stealthy seals and dive-bombing gannets.

programme.title: E2 - Florida Keys National Marine Sanctuary
programme.desc: This episode examines the importance of three marine habitat types in the Florida Keys including the animals within them and conservationists’ efforts to protect them.

programme.title: E5 - Mexico's Artificial Reefs
programme.desc: From opportunistic pirate ships, to well-armed navy vessels, Mexico’s Yucatan Peninsula is steeped in maritime history.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: Summer Animations: Crayon Shinchan The Movie: Our Dinosaur Diary
programme.desc: Shinchan is really excited about the coming summer holiday! What's amazing about this summer is that there is a special news that shocks the whole world - A “Dinosaur Park” that revives extinct dinosaurs is opened in Tokyo! What's more, the Kasukabe Team receives a special invitation to explore the new park! The team enjoys the facilities in the world-renowned “Dinosaur Park” while having a close look on giant dinosaurs, and become so excited about everything they see! After opening of the park, a dinosaur fever is all the rage worldwide! At the same time, Shiro meets a little dinosaur called “Nana” at the riverside. As Shinchan and his friends beg sincerely, Nana becomes a member of the Nohara family, living together with Shinchan and Shiro, and creates a lot of wonderful memories. However, when Shinchan is enjoying this unique summer, dinosaurs suddenly escape from the park and rush into Tokyo! How will this “Dinosaur Crisis” end? What is the secret behind Nana's appearance

programme.title: An Abandoned Team
programme.desc: Yam Chun Kai, is a 60-year-old curmudgeon living alone. Forced into retirement, Uncle Kai reflects on his failed marriage and strained relationship with his daughter. As the hopelessness prompts him to end his life, a stray dog named Roast Piggy finds Uncle Kai and leads an animal welfare volunteer, Una Tang, to rescue him-the intelligence and humanity of Roast Piggy change Uncle Kai's attitude towards stray animals. Uncle Kai becomes friends with Una and joins her animal shelter 'Warm Home' as a volunteer, helping the abandoned animals. Una hopes Uncle Kai can take this opportunity to clear the air between him and his daughter Zoie. Just as Uncle Kai's life seems to be getting back on track, several dog poisoning incidents occur in the village he lives in...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E288 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Chow Yun-fat: God of Gambler's Return
programme.desc: Five years have passed since the events of the first God of Gamblers film. Ko Chun is now living a peaceful retirement on his French estate with his pregnant wife Wan Yau, while his disciples Knife and Sing have become world-renowned in their own right. Chun declines repeated challenges from other top-ranked gamblers, having given up gambling in favor of the quiet life. Chun's friend and former bodyguard, Lung Wu, the 'God Of Guns', comes to pay him a visit. While the two are away from the house for a friendly shooting competition, Chau Siu-Chee, a Taiwanese gambler and the world's number one contender to Ko Chun's title, arrives and murders his wife and unborn son in order to goad Chun into a gambling match. After a shootout with Chau Siu-Chee's henchmen, Ko Chun arrives to discover his wife dying. With her last breath, she asks Chun to promise that he will not gamble or admit his real identity for one year, in the hopes that he will not lose his life in an impulsive act of

programme.title: Project Gutenberg
programme.desc: Lee Man, a member of a notorious money counterfeiting ring, is arrested in Thailand and extradited back to Hong Kong. Thanks to renowned painter Yuen Man, Lee is offered a deal by the police: Reveal the identity of Painter, the charismatic leader of the counterfeiting ring, and Yuen can bail him out. Lee has no choice but to comply and recount his story. In the 1990s, Lee and Yuen were lovers living together in Vancouver, seeking to be seen in the art world. However, success eludes them, and Lee is forced to go make counterfeit paintings to make a living. Lee's counterfeit paintings catch the eyes of Painter, and he decides to recruits Lee to join his team. Together with Painter's elite team, Lee travels the world in search of technologies to create the “Super Dollar,” a counterfeit bill that circumvents the anti-counterfeiting measures of the 1996 American dollar. But when Lee witnesses Painter's violent methods in action, he becomes desperate to escape his employer's grip..

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E54

programme.title: E821
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5191
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E319 - 2

Dans les hebdos
programme.desc: Avec des reportages des correspondants sur le terrain et des interviews de personnalités phares, retrouvez l'actualité mondiale qui bouge et qui change. Toute l'actualité internationale avec les décryptages des journalistes de France 24.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: À l'affiche[Live]
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Actuelles[Live]
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Outre-mer
programme.desc: Outre-mer part à la rencontre des habitants des îles d'outre-mer pour explorer leur quotidien. L'émission met en lumière leurs réalités, leurs défis et les problématiques locales, offrant un regard humain et authentique sur ces territoires souvent méconnus.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: BS Special 'The Light of Hope: Asian University For Women'
programme.desc: Asian University for Women, founded in Bangladesh in 2008, welcomes talented students from countries where women face deep inequality and seeks to cultivate future female leaders. Women from 20 Asian nations study here, including those who secretly fled Afghanistan and Rohingya refugees pursuing knowledge for their communities, all striving to build a new future despite discrimination and poverty.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Desafio Ruta 40

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E30 - A. Salty Codgers/Knowledge
programme.desc: Raven is delighted when the other Titans are magically turned into old people during a battle.

programme.title: E1 - A. Spike Gets Skooled/Cats Ruffled Furniture/Sleep Disorder/Tom's In-Tents Adventure/
programme.desc: Tom gets Spike sent to obedience school, and Jerry is left without a protector. When Spike returns, Tom tries hard to get Spike to revert to his old ways, but Jerry fights back.

programme.title: E107 - Mime Games/Spring Clean
programme.desc: A leisurely stroll in the park turns into a run when Mr. Bean is chased home by an angry Mime Artist. He is lost for more words than usual when the street performer makes himself at home and insists on being wined and dined.

programme.title: E414 - Magic Marker/Theatre Night/Some Kind Of Magic
programme.desc: After failing to capture Lamput with their gadgets, the Docs turn to magic. They buy a magic marker that can give them any superpower they draw on their skin.

programme.title: E311 - The Hollow Ones
programme.desc: Ras leads Arin and Sora into unexpected chaos in Mysterium while the Ninja recruit Jay for a special mission.

programme.title: E1 - Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Meet 87 year old Tim Slessor, the British adventurer plotting his last great adventure: recreating his epic 1955 expedition - 'First Overland: London to Singapore' - which a young David Attenborough commissioned for the BBC.

programme.desc: In Canada, there's nowhere to go as homes are washed down river. An ice skater is on thin ice in New Jersey and a cliff edge in Brazil collapses after heavy rain.

programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Tubig To Handle Sun
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Astig Vegan S3
programme.desc: A cooking show hosted by RG Enriquez-Diez, showcasing plant-based recipes inspired by Filipino cuisine and beloved Filipino dishes.

programme.desc: LUCKY YOU! Open the briefcase and welcome the winnings. The Pambansang Host Luis Manzano is back, together with 20 lucky stars, as they play in all‑new original episodes of the luckiest season yet of Kapamilya Deal or No Deal!

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Fruit Punch
programme.desc: Five young men threw themselves with heart and soul into the work force. They have different approaches and different life styles. Ah Kit is the hardworking investment broker. He is so busy making money. Ah Chi is a postman believing in fung shui. Ah Hark is an apprentice in his family jewelry shop and Ah Wai failed in public exam. Ah Ming is the most unconventional of the five. Working in a Japanese restaurant. The five start a laundry shop which soon folds. Next, they try something new to save their business. Ah Ming leads a carefree life which dismays his girl, Yoko. Ah Hark's girlfriend Cat will move to Australia and leave him soon. Ah Ming and Ah Hark are going to lose their girlfriends. The five new generation are going their own ways...

programme.desc: SWAT team member Dee is forced to go into action beyond the call of duty when his drunken father falls foul of local triad chief Hung Kwan. programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: My Run, My Way - Your Run-trip Guide The moment you run, the journey begins! Travel is a way to rediscover yourself in unfamiliar places. programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.
